M1.name: Wire Voice Pipeline to CCP Extraction
M1.change: Added Step 5.5 after reformulation — CCPPipeline.process_text() called on corrected transcript

M2.name: Wire Friday Morning Briefing to PM Surface
functions_added: get_reward_briefing() — aggregate_rewards(today) → net reward + QLoRA hold status
get_decay_briefing() — decay engine sweep result → expiry/aging status
M2.test_output: You have 12 items across 6 tabs. 11 pending, 1 in progress.

M3.name: Wire Confirm Endpoint to PM Surface via PMStore
M3.change: Replaced direct _write_element_to_pm() calls in confirm/override actions with PMStore.add_from_dict(). Custom override_destination still uses direct JSONL append. Non-tab types (learning_moment, constitutional_proposal) use direct JSONL.

M4.name: Single-Writer Refactor
changes: route_element(): removed _write_element_to_pm() call — sets destination_path only, written=False
pipeline.process_text(): added Step 3.5 — PMStore().ingest_ccp_result(result) after result dict built
store.ingest_ccp_result(): added dedup check (existing_ids set), added original_confidence field
M4.result: PMStore is the sole writer to PM JSON tab files. No dual-write paths remain.
M4.test: pm_written tracked in pipeline result — confirmed=1 per run

M6.name: End-to-End Integration Test
tests: T1: CCP pipeline e2e — extracted=5, pm_written=1
T2: PM surface has items — total_items=10
T4: PM briefing returns live counts
T5: Reward briefing shows today signals + net reward
T6: Decay briefing returns status string
T8: Voice pipeline has CCP fields

design_notes: Decay math: total_decay = sum((hours_in_band / 12) * rate_per_12h) across DECAY_SCHEDULE bands
At 36h: only 12h in 24-48h band = 1 period * 0.05 = 0.05 decay (directive showed 48h math)
Single-writer ensures no race conditions between router and pipeline writing to same JSON tabs
original_confidence preserved in PM entry so decay engine has baseline to work from
get_decay_briefing() runs a live sweep on every morning briefing call — lightweight since most items are fresh
next_steps: Wire apply_decay_sweep() into EPOS daemon APScheduler (every 12h)
Activate PM hook point signals in voice/router.py when PM surface goes live
Wire nightly_training.py to check_qlora_hold() before checkpoint deployment
Add /pm/decay endpoint to FastAPI pm_router for manual sweep trigger
